title: Pride Allowable In Poets.
content:
As thou deserv'st, be proud; then gladly let
    The Muse give thee the Delphic coronet.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Pride Allowable In Poets."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
